name: academic-ppt
description: Build editable thesis defense and academic research presentations from local materials.

interface.shortDescription: Turn thesis materials into editable defense decks.
interface.longDescription: Academic PPT converts local thesis and research materials into concise, editable PowerPoint decks with source-aware planning, JavaScript authoring, and built-in validation.
defaultPrompt: Build a thesis defense deck from these local materials.
Turn this paper and screenshots into an editable academic PPT.
Generate a concise research presentation with source traceability.
